Web Design Ottawa

We build high-performance, conversion-driven websites for Ottawa businesses. From the ByWard Market to the Glebe, our web design services help Ottawa companies attract more customers and grow their online presence.

Why Ottawa Businesses Need Professional Web Design

Ottawa is Canada's capital city with over one million residents and a thriving business ecosystem. From government contractors on Parliament Hill to tech startups in Centretown, businesses across the city need professional websites.

At Neon Web Agency, we specialize in building high-performance websites for Ottawa businesses combining stunning design with robust SEO optimization.

Local SEO for Ottawa Businesses

Ranking on Google for Ottawa-based searches is critical. We optimize every website for local search terms, implement schema markup, and set up Google Business Profiles.

Our Ottawa SEO strategies have helped dozens of businesses achieve first-page rankings.

What We Deliver for Ottawa Businesses

Custom Responsive Design

Every website custom-designed and fully responsive for all devices.

Lightning-Fast Performance

Sub-2-second load times using modern frameworks.

Local SEO Optimization

On-page SEO, schema markup, and GBP optimization for Ottawa.

Conversion-Focused UX

Strategic layouts and CTAs designed to turn visitors into customers.

CMS Integration

Easy-to-use content management without technical knowledge.

Ongoing Support

Continuous monitoring, security updates, and optimization.

Web Design Ottawa — FAQ

How much does web design cost in Ottawa?
Our packages start at $1,499. Most businesses invest between $1,499-$6,999.
How long does it take to build a website?
Most websites are completed within 2-4 weeks.
Do you offer SEO services?
Yes! SEO is built into every website. We also offer monthly SEO packages.
Will my website work on mobile?
Absolutely. Every website is mobile-first and fully responsive.
Do you offer ongoing support?
Yes, maintenance packages starting at $99/month.
